message:
security: redact credentials and tokens in Debug impls across 6 connector clients

Replace derived Debug with hand-written impls that print "[REDACTED]" for
sensitive fields (auth tokens, access tokens, AES keys, webhook URLs).
This prevents accidental credential leakage through debug logging, panic
backtraces, or structured error output.

Affected connectors and their redacted fields:
- google-chat ChatClient: auth field
- google-docs DocsClient: auth field
- google-sheets SheetsClient: auth field
- nextcloud-talk NextcloudTalkClient: auth field
- synology-chat SynologyChatClient: incoming_url (contains webhook token)
- wecom WeComClient: token_cache; CachedAccessToken: token; CallbackCrypto: token + aes_key

All impls use finish_non_exhaustive() where applicable to signal additional
private fields exist without revealing them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
